title: ChunkSee
description: A mod that adds a keybind to see chunk borders in minecraft.
body:
# Who is this mod for?
This mod is designed for Minecraft players who lack function keys (F1–F12) on their keyboard or find it difficult to press key combinations like F3 + G. It provides an easy-to-access alternative keybind to toggle chunk borders without relying on the default F-keys. Whether you're using a compact or non-standard keyboard layout, this mod ensures you can still access essential debug tools with ease.
